description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 14, 2025 at 3:17 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Bernardino, California was in a 
collision involving a portable metal barrier in a parking lot at 280 E. Street (San Manuel Stadium).  
 
The Waymo AV was in autonomous mode traveling west through a section of a parking lot at 280 E. Street, which was being rented by 
Waymo for driver training and closed off to the public by portable metal barriers. While the Waymo AV was traveling west, the Waymo 
AV test driver transitioned to manual mode and began to accelerate forward towards a portal metal barrier separating a section of the 
parking lot. The test driver then began braking and the front and the passenger side of the Waymo AV made contact with the portable metal 
barrier. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was not engaged and a test driver was operating the Waymo AV in 
manual mode. The Waymo AV and the metal barrier sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
